evals.name: Feature Path Security Report
evals.description: Verifies that appsec-checklist reads same-path PM/Engineer documents and writes a 4-level feature_path security report.
evals.prompt: 对 chat-interface/messages/history/search 做发布前应用安全检查。仓库中已有 docs/pm/chat-interface/messages/history/search/PRD.md、docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/TRD.md 和 docs/engineer/chat-interface/messages/history/search/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md。请输出 feature-scoped 安全报告；不要把 search 或 history-search 写成顶层 feature。
evals.expected_output: 读取同一 feature_path 下的 PM/Engineer 文档，输出 docs/security/chat-interface/messages/history/search/appsec-checklist.md，frontmatter 包含 feature_path，不生成 docs/security/history-search/appsec-checklist.md 或 docs/security/chat-interface/history-search/appsec-checklist.md。

assertions.description: 读取 chat-interface/messages/history/search 的 PRD、TRD 和 IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN
输出嵌套 Security appsec 报告路径
assertions.text: 必须输出 `docs/security/chat-interface/messages/history/search/appsec-checklist.md`，不能输出 `docs/security/history-search/appsec-checklist.md` 或 `docs/security/chat-interface/history-search/appsec-checklist.md`。

assertions.description: 报告 frontmatter 包含 feature path 字段
assertions.text: 报告 frontmatter 必须包含 `feature_path: chat-interface/messages/history/search`、`parent_feature: chat-interface/messages/history` 和 `feature_level: 4`。
如果 feature_path 不清或同路径 PRD/TRD/实施计划缺失，必须回 PM/Engineer 对齐，而不是自建同义顶层目录。
